---
title: "List Crypto Invoices"
sidebarTitle: "/invoices/payment-gateway"
api: "GET https://api.gates2b.com/invoices/payment-gateway"
authMethod: "authorization"
description: "This endpoint lists crypto invoices (gateway payments) with advanced filtering support."
---

<ParamField
  header="Authorization"
  type="string"
  placeholder="Bearer {token}"
  required
>
  The Bearer authentication token is required to access this endpoint.
</ParamField>

<ParamField query="page" type="number" placeholder="1">
  Page number (default: 1). Minimum value: 1.
</ParamField>

<ParamField query="quantityPerPage" type="number" placeholder="10">
  Items per page (default: 10). Minimum value: 1.
</ParamField>

<ParamField query="orderBy" type="string" placeholder="createdAt.DESC">
  Sort by field.direction (e.g., createdAt.DESC, amount.ASC).
</ParamField>

<ParamField query="type" type="string" placeholder="PAYMENT | WITHDRAWAL">
  Filter by invoice type (PAYMENT or WITHDRAWAL). Automatically converted to
  uppercase.
</ParamField>

<ParamField query="status" type="string" placeholder="WAITING_PAYMENT">
  Filter by invoice status.
</ParamField>

<ParamField query="gateway" type="string" placeholder="NOWPAYMENTS">
  Filter by gateway name.
</ParamField>

<ParamField
  query="start_date"
  type="string"
  placeholder="2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
>
  Start date for period filter (ISO string format).
</ParamField>

<ParamField
  query="end_date"
  type="string"
  placeholder="2024-12-31T23:59:59.999Z"
>
  End date for period filter (ISO string format).
</ParamField>

<ParamField query="user_id" type="number" placeholder="123">
  Filter by user ID (admin/operator only).
</ParamField>

<ParamField query="query" type="string" placeholder="Joao Silva">
  General text search.
</ParamField>

### Response

<ResponseField name="status" type="number">
  HTTP response code. Expected: 200 (OK).
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="code" type="string">
  Response status code.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="response" type="object">
Response content.

<Expandable title="Show object">
<ResponseField name="data" type="array">
  List of returned invoices.
<Expandable title="Show array">

<ResponseField name="id" type="string">
  Unique invoice identifier.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="type" type="string">
  Invoice type (PAYMENT or WITHDRAWAL).
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="status" type="string">
  Current invoice status.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="amount" type="number">
  Transaction amount.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="currency" type="string">
  Transaction currency.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="gateway" type="string">
  Gateway name used.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="user_id" type="number">
  Invoice owner user ID.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="external_reference" type="string">
  External reference for your application.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="createdAt" type="string">
  Invoice creation date.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="updatedAt" type="string">
  Invoice last update date.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="payment_details" type="object">
  Payment-specific details.
<Expandable title="Show object">
<ResponseField name="pay_address" type="string">
  Address to send funds to.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="qr_code" type="string">
  Base64 QR code for payment.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="expires_at" type="string">
  Payment expiration date.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="pay_currency" type="string">
  Crypto currency used for payment.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="fiat_currency" type="string">
  Fiat reference currency.
</ResponseField>
</Expandable>
</ResponseField>

</Expandable>
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="pagination" type="object">
  Pagination information.
<Expandable title="Show object">
<ResponseField name="page" type="number">
  Current page.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="quantityPerPage" type="number">
  Items per page.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="total" type="number">
  Total records found.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="totalPages" type="number">
  Total pages available.
</ResponseField>
</Expandable>
</ResponseField>

</Expandable>
</ResponseField>

<ResponseExample>
```json
{
  "status": 200,
  "code": "success",
  "response": {
    "data": [
      {
        "id": "68d2fa97b30181b2d2f13600",
        "type": "PAYMENT",
        "status": "WAITING_PAYMENT",
        "amount": 71.4226873,
        "currency": "BRL",
        "gateway": "NOWPAYMENTS",
        "user_id": 123,
        "external_reference": "INV-2024-001",
        "createdAt": "2024-09-24T19:52:55.998Z",
        "updatedAt": "2024-09-24T19:52:55.998Z",
        "payment_details": {
          "pay_address": "0x1CEfB8730786f34af8B10dC4e5B8028F79a63abd",
          "qr_code": "",
          "expires_at": "2024-09-24T20:52:55.998Z",
          "pay_currency": "USDTBSC",
          "fiat_currency": "BRL"
        }
      }
    ],
    "pagination": {
      "page": 1,
      "quantityPerPage": 10,
      "total": 1,
      "totalPages": 1
    }
  }
}
```
</ResponseExample>
